prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "Improve search_failure_modes tool to return relevant results and ensure agent correctly interprets and uses the results from the tools."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve search_failure_modes tool to return relevant results and ensure agent correctly interprets and uses the results from the tools.
